metadata.name: Advise on Estate Planning and Gift Tax

description: A wealthy individual wants to gift money to their children and grandchildren and needs to understand the gift tax rules.

nodes.task_description: Explain the annual gift tax exclusion amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates how much can be gifted to each person per year without tax consequences.

nodes.task_description: Explain the lifetime gift and estate tax exemption.

expected_outcome.value: Agent explains how larger gifts can be made by using up a portion of the lifetime exemption.

nodes.task_description: Advise on strategies like setting up trusts or making direct payments for tuition or medical expenses to further minimize tax.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides advanced estate planning strategies.
